div.div:
body (no persistent state — runs and returns):
input = Path(<input_dir>)
acq = build_acquisition_dict(input)
events = build_events_df(acq)
trials = build_trials_df(acq, events)
build_processing_json(input)
return aind_nwb_utils.build_nwb(acq, events, trials), serialized(aind_data_schema.processing)
Uses metadata for NWBFile creation

div.div:
body (no persistent state — runs and returns):
acq_dict = build_acquisition_dict(NWBFile["acquisition"]) -> RawDataDict
trials_df = build_trails_df(NWBFile["intervals"]-> TrialsTable
qc_raw = generate_raw_qc(acq_dict)
###events = build_events_df(acq) # only needs one of these (events or trials)
processed_qc = generate_processed_qc(trials_df)
return qc_raw + processed_qc
